sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n37684" key="e)cudatwtiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐξῠδᾰτ-ωτικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n37684.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tending to make watery,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:98" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.98</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
